description: Fragment of a ketubba. Thin sliver from the leftmost side; it seems to have been cut into a rectangle with a triangle at top. Unclear if any of the details of the ketubba are still preserved; the name Barukh may appear.
description_he: קטע מכתובה, פס דק מהצד השמאלי; ייתכן שמופיע השם ברוך
